label: All-cause serious adverse event
seriousness_definition: Source regulatory definition; map death, life threat, hospitalization, disability, congenital anomaly, or other medically important event.
severity_rule: Record separately; severity does not define seriousness.
ascertainment_priority: active or explicit systematic ascertainment preferred

label: Death
seriousness_definition: Death from any cause in the prespecified window.

label: Emergency transfer or hospitalization
seriousness_definition: Transfer to emergency care or inpatient admission, preserving source definition.

label: ICU-level care or organ support
seriousness_definition: ICU admission, ventilation, vasopressors, or other organ support.

label: Severe psychiatric or behavioral event requiring intervention
seriousness_definition: Panic, anxiety, psychosis, mania, dissociation, agitation, or behavioral event requiring rescue medication, extended observation, restraint, transfer, or hospitalization.
ascertainment_priority: structured clinician assessment plus intervention record

label: Self-harm, suicide attempt, or sustained clinically important worsening
seriousness_definition: Preserve source definition, instrument, ideation/behavior distinction, and intervention threshold.

label: Mania or psychosis
seriousness_definition: Clinician-defined mania, hypomania, psychosis, or loss of reality testing.

label: Prolonged severe anxiety, panic, or dissociation
seriousness_definition: Severe event persisting beyond expected acute effects or requiring intervention.

label: Rescue medication
seriousness_definition: Any protocol-defined medication used to manage acute or delayed symptoms.
severity_rule: Record medication, dose, indication, and timing.

label: Extended observation
seriousness_definition: Observation beyond planned discharge or monitoring period because of symptoms or safety concern.

label: Any treatment-emergent adverse event
seriousness_definition: Preserve study TEAE definition and coding dictionary.

label: Investigator-attributed drug-related serious adverse event
seriousness_definition: Study investigator or sponsor attribution; exact rule preserved.
